title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, TWO THOUSAND AND EIGHT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9498, January 01, 2008 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, TWO THOUSAND AND EIGHT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

See GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT (January 1 - December 31, 2008)
